title: Elytra Boost
description: Adds an Enchantment That Makes Elytra Constantly Accelerate Without Rockets
body:
## Elytra Thrusters ### Adds the "Thrusters" Enchantment 🚀 - This enchantment propels the player forward while gliding - Hold SNEAK while gliding to brake (disables propulsion) - The propulsion velocity increases with each level (Max III) --- ### Updated to Beta Version 1.0.0 🥳 - "Thrusters" enchanted books can be found in end city treasure chests - Thrusters I (10%) Thrusters II (5%) Thrusters III (3%) - Adjusted flight speeds: - Thrusters I is marginally slower than constant flight duration 3 fireworks (~75%) - Thrusters II is marginally faster than constant flight duration 3 fireworks (~130%) - Thrusters III is MUCH faster than constant flight duration 3 fireworks (~250%)
looking at likely further limiting Thrusters III in a future patch for better vanilla friendly-ish balancing
Config Options (& How to Enable the old "Boost" Enchant) - Provides a few config options ⚙️ - **Added toggle to revert any "Thrusters" book to a "Boost" book on pickup 😎** - /scoreboard players set .UseLegacyEnchant 1 - defaults to 0 (false) - Thrusters I -> Boost I - Thrusters II -> Boost III - Thrusters III -> Boost IV - Added toggle allowing the reload message to be disabled - /scoreboard players set .BroadcastReloadMessage 0 - defaults to 1 (true) - You can view the current config values at any time with: - /scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar ElytraBoostConfig - to remove display: /scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar **WARNING:** the "Boost" enchantment is from the Alpha version and is **MUCH** stronger. I am leaving it in for those who used this pack in alpha to continue support and as an option to new downloaders - but it is **WILDLY UNBALANCED** from standard gameplay so please be sure to test it out prior commiting to its full implementation!!
please view the changelog for the most recent and detailed... details...! --- **THIS DATAPACK IS CURRENTLY** (very much) **IN BETA**: any and all feedback is very welcome & appreciated! _if the current release isn't quite right for you, feel free to reach out! I'd likely be willing to customize a version of the pack to better suit your use case 👍_ *Thx for checking out my datapack!! -DRE* --- ### Contact feel free to reach out with any issues/inquiries at: drecubed.contact@gmail.com ---
